onChange.template: [Category: visualidentity] Apply the Gummy style to the game visuals. Soft translucent edges, warm saturated colors, vinyl figure charm. After applying, update the gameplan to reflect the new appearance.

[Category: visualidentity] Apply the Neon style to the game visuals. Glowing outlines, dark background, cyberpunk-lite with bright accent colors. After applying, update the gameplan to reflect the new appearance.

[Category: visualidentity] Apply the Watercolor style to the game visuals. Soft painted edges, pastel palette, organic brushstroke textures. After applying, update the gameplan to reflect the new appearance.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/visualidentity/category.schema.json, set vic_theme to {{vic_theme}}]
Change the game theme to {{vic_theme}}. Regenerate all tier sprites and update colors to match.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/visualidentity/category.schema.json, set vic_container to {{vic_container}}]
Change container shape to {{vic_container}}. Update container rendering and adjust wall bounds if needed.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/visualidentity/category.schema.json, set vit_container_width to {{vit_container_width}}]
Set container width to {{vit_container_width}} pixels. Adjust CONTAINER_LEFT and CONTAINER_RIGHT symmetrically.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/visualidentity/category.schema.json, set vit_eye_size to {{vit_eye_size}}]
Set FACE_EYE_SIZE to {{vit_eye_size}} (fraction of radius).

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/visualidentity/category.schema.json, set vit_mouth_y to {{vit_mouth_y}}]
Set FACE_MOUTH_Y to {{vit_mouth_y}} (fraction of radius).
